title: Unexpected Internal Error in Inner Join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS database0_t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 DATE);
INSERT INTO database0_t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS database0_t2(c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO database0_t2(c2, c3) VALUES ('example', INTERVAL 12 MONTH);
SELECT * FROM database0_t1 JOIN database0_t2 ON (database0_t1.c2 NOT LIKE CAST(database0_t2.c3 AS CHAR));
key_bug_features: Inner join with interval comparison causes internal error
